'''Kiidan''' was the capital [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cilpar]].

It was also the base of operations for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Boren Tascl]] and [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Norquest]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The city was defended by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Walker/Legends|walkers]], as well as [[Crimson Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Crimson Squadron]].

[[File:Crimson_Squadron.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Crimson Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Crimson Squadron]] leaves Kiidan.]]

In its efforts with the local resistance to oust the Empire, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] established a hidden base west of the city. Approximately one month after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Tascl was [[Mission to Cilpar|overthrown]] and Cilpar joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
